PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 } catch { $resp = $_.Exception.Response; if \($resp\) { $sr = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $body = $sr.ReadToEnd\(\); $body.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(2000,$body.Length\)\) } else { $_.Exception.Message } })

PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 | Out-Null } catch { $resp=$_.Exception.Response; if\($resp\){$sr=New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $b=$sr.ReadToEnd\(\); if\($b -match '"message":"\([^"]+\)"'\){$matches[1]}else{$b.Substring\(0,[Math]::Min\(600,$b.Length\)\)}} })

PowerShell(try { Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/services" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60 | Out-Null } catch { $resp=$_.Exception.Response; $sr=New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $b=$sr.ReadToEnd\(\); $i=$b.IndexOf\('message'\); if\($i -ge 0\){ $b.Substring\($i,[Math]::Min\(300,$b.Length-$i\)\) } else { "no message; len="+$b.Length } })

PowerShell(Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; @\("/","/services"\) | ForEach-Object { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000$_" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 90; "$_ -> $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $resp=$_.Exception.Response; if\($resp\){$sr=New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\); $b=$sr.ReadToEnd\(\); $j=$b.IndexOf\('does not exist'\); if\($j -ge 0\){"$_ -> ERR: "+$b.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$j-60\),120\)}else{"$_ -> 500 \(other\)"}}else{"$_ -> $\($_.Exception.Message\)"} } })

PowerShell($conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1; if \($conn\) { "PID on 3000: $\($conn.OwningProcess\)"; $p = Get-Process -Id $conn.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "name: $\($p.ProcessName\)" } else { "nothing on 3000" })

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 20;$i++\){ Start-Sleep -Seconds 5; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "try $i -> HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $ok=$true; break } catch { $resp=$_.Exception.Response; if\($resp\){$sr=New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\);$b=$sr.ReadToEnd\(\); $j=$b.IndexOf\('does not exist'\); if\($j -ge 0\){"try $i -> CSS ERR: "+$b.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$j-40\),90\); break} else {"try $i -> 500"}} else {"try $i -> $\($_.Exception.Message\)"} } }; if\(-not $ok\){"not ready / error"})

PowerShell($on3000 = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if\($on3000\){"still listening pid $\($on3000.OwningProcess\)"}else{"nothing on 3000"}; \(Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object\).Count.ToString\(\) + " node procs")

PowerShell($log = "i:\\Infibook Dubai\\devserver.log"; if\(Test-Path $log\){Remove-Item $log -Force}; $npm = \(Get-Command npm.cmd -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; if\(-not $npm\){$npm="npm.cmd"}; Start-Process -FilePath "cmd.exe" -ArgumentList "/c","`"$npm`" run dev > `"$log`" 2>&1" -WorkingDirectory "i:\\Infibook Dubai" -WindowStyle Hidden; "launched via cmd, npm=$npm")

PowerShell($ok=$false; for\($i=0;$i -lt 18;$i++\){ Start-Sleep -Seconds 6; try { $r=Invoke-WebRequest "http://localhost:3000/" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 60; "try $i -> HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)"; $ok=$true; break } catch { $resp=$_.Exception.Response; if\($resp\){$sr=New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($resp.GetResponseStream\(\)\);$b=$sr.ReadToEnd\(\); $j=$b.IndexOf\('does not exist'\); if\($j -ge 0\){"try $i -> CSS ERR: "+$b.Substring\([Math]::Max\(0,$j-45\),100\); break} else {"try $i -> 500\(other\)"}} else {"try $i -> down"} } }; if\(-not $ok\){"`n--- last 25 log lines ---"; Get-Content "i:\\Infibook Dubai\\devserver.log" -Tail 25 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue})

PowerShell($edge = "${env:ProgramFiles\(x86\)}\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; if \(-not \(Test-Path $edge\)\) { $edge = "$env:ProgramFiles\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe" }; $out = "$env:TEMP\\globe.png"; if \(Test-Path $out\) { Remove-Item $out -Force }; & $edge --headless=new --disable-gpu --hide-scrollbars --window-size=1280,720 --screenshot="$out" --user-data-dir="$env:TEMP\\edge_gl_$\(Get-Random\)" "http://localhost:3000/" 2>$null | Out-Null; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; if \(Test-Path $out\) { "OK" } else { "no shot" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "i:\\Infibook Dubai\\public" -File | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 12 Name, @{n='KB';e={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB\)}}, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($pub = "i:\\Infibook Dubai\\public"; Write-Output "=== covers ==="; Get-ChildItem "$pub\\covers" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; Write-Output "=== sectors ==="; Get-ChildItem "$pub\\sectors" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name; Write-Output "=== cards ==="; Get-ChildItem "$pub\\cards" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)
